Blowout quarter, up 65% YTD; best-in-class liquid cooling for data center AI infrastructure. Strong Nvidia partnership; expanding cooling capacity rapidly. Industry demand is 'build build build.' Stock justly reflecting fundamentals.

Q1 quarter for the ages: 17-cent EPS beat (up 83% YoY), operating margin +430bps, raised FY guidance to 29-31% organic growth. Stock up 88% YTD. CEO Albertazzi: still book-and-ship in guidance despite sold-out appearance. Competitive moat includes technology, scaling ability, holistic data center approach, service portfolio, Nvidia relationships. New 'bring your own power' partnerships (Cat, Solar Turbines) enabling off-grid data center builds. Working ahead of Nvidia roadmap to have cooling solutions ready for Vera Rubin chips.
